name: mcbaivn-download-aio
description: Download videos, audio, playlists, subtitles, and thumbnails from ANY platform (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, Twitter/X, Twitch, Vimeo, SoundCloud, Reddit, and 1000+ more) using yt-dlp. After download, automatically send file to Telegram if under 50MB.
description_vi: Tải video, audio, playlist, phụ đề, thumbnail từ 1000+ nền tảng bằng yt-dlp. Sau khi tải tự động gửi file về Telegram nếu dung lượng <= 50MB.
author: Bằng (mcbaivn)
